title: Governed Adaptive Knowledge State and Approval Substrate
description: Generalize the proven human-state reference implementation into platform-neutral governed subjects, domains, knowledge states, and context-bound approval applicability across human and nonhuman subject classes.
acceptance_criteria: Generic Subject, Domain, KnowledgeState, and ApprovalApplicability contracts work without subject-specific schema forks
Context, confidence, validity, provenance, interpretive authority, behavioral authority, sensitivity, lineage, and execution context are explicit
All state creation reuses Sprint 5 journaling, receipts, recovery, idempotency, and context-isolation controls
TEST approvals can exercise generic state creation across one human and at least two nonhuman subject classes without production effects
Human consent, privacy, self-declaration, correction, and production-approval rights remain stricter policy overlays
Canonical views, authority registration, migration mappings, and audits preserve approval and execution context
